name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 16 Jun 2020
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.107"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Minor Improvements","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Checkout settings have been updated to include a description for the alert messages. These descriptions give you an idea of their colours without needing trial and error."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Postcode data for Australia has been updated."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with eBay where variation images wouldn't change when different options were selected. Now, changing the option (e.g., colour) will change the image on the eBay listing correctly."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with eBay where images were not updating when the listing was revised."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
